nodes.label: sanad-review-summary.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad legal app showing the Smart Review (المراجعة الذكية) panel's session-completion screen inside the Student View. The user scored 100% on a 1-question review session completed in 36 seconds. The screen celebrates with a party-popper emoji, displays 'انتهت الجلسة!' (Session Ended!), shows stats (1 correct, 1 reviewed, 36s duration), and offers two CTA buttons: 'العودة للمراجعة' (Return to Review) and 'جلسة جديدة' (New Session). The header contains a role switcher (طالب/محامي), a language toggle (EN/AR), date display, and the Sanad logo. Six tabs are visible: صباح الطالب, المواد الدراسية (5), المواعيد الأكاديمية, بنك المصطلحات (16), بنك القضايا (6), and المراجعة الذكية (active). Footer notes PWA support and home-server optimisation.

properties.app_tagline: لوحة العمليات اليومية للمحامين والمنشآت الصغيرة في السعودية

nodes.label: Smart Review Session Completion Screen
nodes.description: UI pattern: a celebratory end-of-session results screen rendered by ReviewPanel when all cards in a review session have been answered. Shows score (%), counts of correct vs. reviewed cards, elapsed time, and two navigation actions. Reinforces gamification through visual celebration (emoji, green score colour).

nodes.label: Student Role (طالب)
nodes.description: One of two user roles in the Sanad app (the other being Lawyer/محامي). The Student role activates the Student View with its six learning-focused tabs. Switchable at runtime via a role-switcher control in the app header.

nodes.label: Sanad PWA
nodes.description: The Sanad app is deployed as a Progressive Web App (PWA), optimised for home-server self-hosting. Footer text confirms 'محسّن للخادم المنزلي • PWA مفعّل' (Optimised for home server • PWA enabled).
